title: Crispy Ukrainian Sausages Stir-fry
description: A flavorful and crispy dish that combines traditional Ukrainian sausage with herbs for a perfect brunch option, gluten-free friendly.

ingredients.name: Herbs
ingredients.amount: 1 tbsp fresh dill, 1 tbsp parsley, 1 tsp thyme

instructions: Heat oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add sliced onions to the pan and sauté until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes.
Remove onions from the pan and set aside. In the same pan, add sausage slices and cook until golden brown on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side. Add salt and pepper as needed.
Add minced garlic to the pan and sauté for another minute until fragrant.
Return onions to the pan along with chopped herbs. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until all ingredients are fully heated and combined.
Serve hot as a side dish, garnished with fresh dill sprigs.
